testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A - this repo has no frontend surface (library-plugin classification, Phase -1A); authorization per design.md Testing section
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A - no API surface in this repo; verification is the pytest suite + the instruction-compliance lint
testing_authorizations.integration_front_to_back: N/A - no both-layer requirement exists; all entries are layer: infra

entries.spec_requirement_id: context-surface-efficiency/Measured census and ranked findings report
scenarios: Findings are ranked by estimated saving
acceptance_criteria: findings artifact exists at .architect-team/findings/context-token-optimization/ with per-class byte totals for all five surface classes
every finding carries estimated saving (bytes/4, method recorded in artifact)
findings ordered by saving weighted by load frequency
engine-reuse disposition recorded (instruction_compliance + claude_md_efficiency consulted; token_compression out of scope by contract)
every edited file has before/after byte counts in the run evidence and final report
every P2 trim passes the mechanical citation test (canonical section cited in-file for every removed restatement)

scenarios: Current-state framing preserved under the doc-currency gate
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md ## Recent releases has at most 3 entries + explicit CHANGELOG.md pointer
What-this-repo-is prose is current-state (no per-release accretion)
doc-currency audit confirms every count/capability statement remains accurate
no removed narrative is lost (CHANGELOG.md canonical copy verified)

entries.spec_requirement_id: context-surface-efficiency/Suite and lint invariants for efficiency remediations
acceptance_criteria: python -m pytest passes with baseline totals (5542 passed + 4 skipped) or a CHANGELOG-recorded delta
any touched pin updated only via its sanctioned lever
48/39/23 surface counts unchanged; no gate/skill/agent/command deleted

entries.spec_requirement_id: context-surface-efficiency/Suite and lint invariants for efficiency remediations
acceptance_criteria: assess_instruction_files reports zero findings over the in-scope set after remediation

scenarios: Deferred items are enumerated, not implemented
acceptance_criteria: final report enumerates each higher-risk item with per-item estimated saving + remediation sketch
run git diff contains no edit implementing a deferred item
